---
name: Bug Report
about: Report something that isn't working correctly
title: '[BUG] '
labels: bug
assignees: ''
---

## Description
A clear description of what the bug is.

## Steps to Reproduce
1. Go to '...'
2. Type '...'
3. Click on '...'
4. See error

## Expected Behavior
What you expected to happen.

## Actual Behavior
What actually happened.

## Screenshots
If applicable, add screenshots (especially of the Transparency panel).

## Environment
- OS: [e.g., Ubuntu 22.04, Windows 11, macOS 14]
- Python version: [e.g., 3.10]
- Ollama model: [e.g., llama2, llama3]
- Browser: [e.g., Chrome, Firefox]

## Additional Context
- Did this work before?
- Any relevant error messages from the terminal?

## Safety Note
If this bug involves crisis detection or safety features, please mark it as high priority.
